text.title: Regulatory Compliance 2026 Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Regulatory Compliance 2026 methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Plan MUST enumerate every applicable regime (ADA Title II, EU EAA, EN 301 549, Section 508, AODA, others) with effective date + scope.

rationale.source: ADA.gov + EAA Directive 2019/882 + ETSI EN 301 549 v3.2.1 + Section 508

rule.statement: Floor target across regimes is WCAG 2.1 AA. EN 301 549 v3.2.1 and EAA reference WCAG 2.1 AA; 2.2 AA satisfies all.

rationale.source: ETSI EN 301 549 v3.2.1 + DOJ Title II rule

rule.rationale: Pinning the floor prevents per-regime drift.

rule.statement: Each productised offering MUST ship a VPAT-ACR (or regional equivalent: EU accessibility statement, AODA filing) signed by a named owner.
rule.rationale: Procurement requires the artefact; missing VPAT-ACR blocks sales.

rule.statement: Per-regime exceptions (e.g. ADA Title II §35.201 archived, EAA §6 fundamental alteration) are itemised with rationale + clause citation per artefact.
rule.rationale: Regulators expect specific exceptions; blanket claims are non-compliant.

rule.statement: Per-region deadlines MUST be pinned: ADA Title II 2026/2027 by size; EAA in-force 2025-06-28; AODA WCAG 2.0 AA already in-force; Section 508 ongoing.

rationale.source: DOJ Title II + EAA + AODA + Section 508 docs

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-regulatory-compliance-2026.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
